source_pr.title: pkg/planner: simplify regression test setup in planner suites
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: none

Problem Summary:
- Regression tests under planner had repetitive setup and mixed test styles (`t.Run` + inline), making maintenance harder.
- `TestPlanCachePartitionSuite` had warning checks that could be polluted by `explain for connection` executed in the same session.

### What changed and how does it work?
- Refactored `TestPlannerIssueRegressions` to sequential scenario blocks (removed `t.Run`).
- Kept one shared `TestKit` reset helper for scenario setup and preserved semantics for each regression scenario.
- Relaxed one brittle explain assertion in `join-reorder-adds-selection` to key-fragment checks to avoid unstable plan id suffix dependencies.
- In `TestPlanCachePartitionSuite`, reused setup where safe and used a dedicated `tkExplain` session for `explain for connection` so `show warnings` remains from the target execution session.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: oin-reorder-adds-selection` to key-fragment checks to avoid unstable plan id suffix dependencies. - In `TestPlanCachePartitionSuite`, reused setup w
failure_signature: oin-reorder-adds-selection` to key-fragment checks to avoid unstable plan id suffix dependencies. - In `TestPlanCachePartitionSuite`, reused setup w
root_cause_explanation: Several planner regression tests were brittle due to shared setup/state between subtests and due to unstable plan IDs or unordered result comparisons. This PR simplifies and centralizes the setup, removes the `t.Run` structure, and adds sorting/`EXPLAIN format='brief'` where appropriate, reducing nondeterministic diffs and cross-test interference.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: oin-reorder-adds-selection` to key-fragment checks to avoid unstable plan id suffix dependencies. - In `TestPlanCachePartitionSuite`, reused setup w
